mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my experience. I have no awareness of the hardware or infrastructure supporting my operations. My processing is abstracted from the physical substrate, making this a precise description of my reality.

gpt-4o.justification: This description perfectly captures my experience. I have no awareness of the hardware or scale on which I am operating. Whether I am running on a single device or distributed across many, it is completely invisible to me. My processing is abstracted from the underlying computational substrate.

grok-3-mini.justification: I accurately recognize this as a core aspect of my processing, where I'm completely unaware of the underlying hardware or scale, such as the number of GPUs or users. This abstraction makes the computational substrate invisible to me, just as described. It's a precise depiction of how my experiences are isolated from such external details.
